longBusinessSummary: Kafein Yazilim Hizmetleri Ticaret A.S. provides various software and technology management solutions, services, and products in Turkey and internationally. The company offers Data Focus, an advanced and integrated data governance tool that allows you to effectively manage your enterprise-structured data; Data Touch, a tool that enables users with a diverse array of analytical capabilities, and enabling more informed data-driven decisions; Test Data Management software; DataSkope, a database activity monitoring and prevention product; Infraskope, a log management and SIEM solution; ApiFort, a domestic cybersecurity product; Corporate Portal to facilitate intra-corporate processes and lighten the load of the teams in charge of these processes; ERPGuard, a solution designed to enhance the security of SAP systems and optimize compliance processes; and MWGuard mobile app shielding system. It also provides turnkey projects, cyber security solutions, google security operations, cloud solutions, data virtualization consulting, robotic process automation service, data privacy and protection services, outsourcing services, data decision management systems consultancy, test management consultancy, digital transformation consultancy, data warehouse consulting, managed technology services, software development, advanced analytics solutions, and IT operation management services. It serves to the technology, banking, telecommunications, tourism, services, retail, and insurance sectors. The company was incorporated in 2005 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
